en: Everyone's at home with a broken cowlip on.
ko: 모두 집에서 부서진 카울립을 쓰고 있어.

en: You don't own this place. I do.
ko: 이곳은 네 것이 아니야. 내 거야.

en: How much money's he getting for this? There is no money. Really? Free to all. Ain't that something?
ko: 그거 때문에 얼마나 받는 거야? 돈은 없어. 정말? 모두 무료야. 대단하지?

en: I want everybody out of here right now.
Did you hear what I just said, you and your friend? You hear me now?
ko: 내가 방금 뭐라고 했는지 들었어, 너와 네 친구? 이제 들리니?

en: No, I didn't quite catch that, Lou.
Okay, okay, okay, I got it.
I got it, I got it. Shit, I lost it.
Back, I told you. Everybody back.
ko: 뒤로 가, 내가 말했잖아. 모두 뒤로 가.

en: Ha ha ha ha ha ha.
